display.purpose: Fraunces serif. Hero and page headlines only, with variable-weight hover on hero.

headline.purpose: Fraunces serif. Section headings within a page.

title.purpose: Plus Jakarta Sans. Card titles, listing names, dialog titles.

body.purpose: Plus Jakarta Sans. Descriptions and prose, 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Plus Jakarta Sans, 11px, 0.14em, uppercase, muted. Eyebrows, chips, pills.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting state of a listing card — near-flat, warm-tinted.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Diffuse warmth under panels and sheets.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Brand-red halo for emphasis moments only.

motion.name: ease-listing
motion.purpose: Listing-card transforms, view transitions, exponential ease-out.

motion.name: ease-weight
motion.purpose: Fraunces variable-weight hover and springy moments.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Active-press feedback on buttons and cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The workhorse CTA — full pill, brand red, springy press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #dc3626; color: #fefdfc; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px hsl(5 71% 51% / 0.25); transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c72a1e; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc3626; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet alternate action — warm-surface pill with ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f1ede9; color: #231e1a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e7e1db; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc3626; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Brand Chip
components.description: Kicker-style brand pill — tinted red fill, uppercase tracked label.
components.css: .ds-chip-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(220, 54, 38, 0.10); color: #dc3626; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 4px 10px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Full-pill search field with brand-red focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-search" type="text" placeholder="Search flyers near you" />
components.css: .ds-input-search { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #e3ddd9; border-radius: 9999px; background: #fefdfc; color: #231e1a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: rgba(116, 106, 99, 0.7); } .ds-input-search:focus { border-color: #dc3626; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(220, 54, 38, 0.10); }

components.name: Listing Card
components.description: Flat-at-rest listing card that lifts with a warm shadow on hover.
components.html:
$240

Mid-century teak sideboard

Brunswick · 2h ago
components.css: .ds-card-listing { display: block; width: 240px; border-radius: 12px; background: #fefdfc; border: 1px solid #e3ddd9; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px hsl(12 35% 22% / 0.04), 0 2px 8px -2px hsl(12 35% 22% / 0.05); transition: transform 280ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 280ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-listing:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 4px 10px hsl(12 35% 22% / 0.08), 0 16px 32px -12px hsl(12 35% 22% / 0.18); } .ds-card-media { height: 150px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f1ede9, #e3ddd9); } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px 14px 16px; } .ds-card-price { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: #231e1a; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-card-title { margin: 2px 0 4px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.3; color: #231e1a; } .ds-card-meta { margin: 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #746a63; }

components.name: Kicker Label
components.description: Editorial small-caps eyebrow in muted ink.
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #746a63; }

narrative.overview: FlyerBoard is a classifieds marketplace that feels like a friendly neighbourhood board, not a database of listings. The surface is warm paper — a calibrated cream neutral (#FAF8F4) — under an almost-invisible film grain. Against that calm canvas, exactly one voice cuts through: the brand red (#DC3626). Headlines are Fraunces, a variable serif with a magazine's composure; everything else is Plus Jakarta Sans. Trustworthy and human, confident without shouting. It rejects cluttered old-Gumtree greyness, cold corporate-SaaS sterility, and loud discount-retail chaos. Depth is quiet — surfaces sit flat and lift with a warm-tinted shadow only on touch. Mobile-first and one-handed; the feed is the heartbeat, chronological and honest.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream paper base with a single confident red accent — never a second loud colour.
Editorial serif (Fraunces) for headlines, humanist sans (Plus Jakarta Sans) for everything else.
Full-pill, tactile buttons with a springy press; warm-tinted shadows, never pure black.
Signature texture: subtle film grain, ambient brand glow, cursor-tracked spotlight on cards.
Flat-by-default depth; motion and shadow appear as a response to state.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The brand red is the only loud colour on any screen, ≤10% of the surface — CTAs, current selection, and state indicators only, never decoration. Bundle teal is the one exception and lives only inside the Bundle feature.

rules.name: The Warm-Black Rule
rules.body: No pure #000 and no pure neutral grey. Every black, grey, and shadow carries the warm hue. Cool blue-grey neutrals are forbidden on content surfaces.

rules.name: The Serif-Headlines-Only Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is for headlines and hero moments only. Buttons, labels, inputs, and dense UI are always Plus Jakarta Sans.

rules.name: The Tabular-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Prices, counts, and dates use tabular-nums so figures stay aligned.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; elevation is earned by interaction. If it looks like it's floating before you touch it, the resting shadow is too heavy.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow rides the --shadow-color channel, never rgba(0,0,0). A cold black shadow on warm cream reads as a foreign object.

dos: Do keep the brand red (#DC3626) as the single loud voice — CTAs, current selection, and state only, on ≤10% of any screen.
Do set headlines in Fraunces and everything else in Plus Jakarta Sans; lean on the serif/sans contrast for hierarchy.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and let warm-tinted shadow appear on hover/focus.
Do use warm neutrals only — warm-ink text, warm borders, warm shadows on the --shadow-color channel.
Do give every interactive element its full state set: default, hover, focus-visible ring, active scale-[0.98], disabled, loading (skeletons, not centre-spinners).
Do use .tabular for prices, counts, and dates.
Do design mobile-first and one-handed; respect safe-area insets and prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't recreate the cluttered, spammy old-Gumtree feel — no dense grey listing walls, dated chrome, or ad-choked pages.
Don't drift toward cold corporate SaaS — no enterprise navy, no blue-grey neutrals, no data-tool sterility.
Don't go loud discount-retail — no screaming SALE badges, no coupon-site chaos, no aggressive upsell.
Don't introduce a second saturated accent to compete with the red. Bundle teal is the only exception.
Don't use pure #000, pure neutral grey, or rgba(0,0,0) shadows on content surfaces.
Don't put Fraunces on buttons, labels, inputs, or table data.
Don't use a coloured border-left/border-right stripe, gradient text as meaning, or glassmorphism as a default surface.
Don't ship a card that floats at rest — if it's shadowed before you touch it, the resting elevation is too heavy.
